title: Zero In ZER039 Cedarwood Refresher Spray , 75 ml & Cedarwood Clothes Moth Balls (Chemical-Free Clothing Moth and Larvae Repellent)
features: Product 1: Cedarwood refresher spray to revive Zero In products which repel clothing moths and larvae from wardrobes, cupboards and drawers in the home
Product 1: Made from 100% natural Eastern aromatic red cedar, spray for effective control of clothing moths and larvae
Product 1: Rejuvenates products used to protect clothes against damage caused by clothing moths and mildew in households
Product 1: 100% natural, poison and chemical-free repellent - helps prevent build-up of mustiness and mildew
Product 2: 20 storage moth balls to repel clothing moths and larvae from wardrobes, cupboards and drawers in the home
Product 2: Made from 100% natural Eastern aromatic red cedar for effective control of clothing moths - an alternative to traditional, old-fashioned moth balls
Product 2: Protects against damage caused by clothes moths, larvae and mildew in households
Product 2: 100% natural, poison and chemical-free repellent - helps prevent build-up of mustiness and mildew
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Cedarwood Refresher Spray Poison-free protection against clothes moths Made with natural Eastern aromatic red cedar oil, Zero In Cedarwood Refresher Spray revitalises your cedarwood products to provide effective, long-lasting control of clothes moths without the use of poisons. A natural repellent for clothes moths, cedarwood also helps prevent build-up of mustiness and mildew and keeps clothes smelling fresh. Use to refresh Zero In Cedarwood Moth Balls and Rings. Not for direct application to clothing or fabric. Eastern aromatic red cedar oil refreshes your cedarwood products for protection against clothes moth damage Long-lasting poison-free control. Use to refresh Zero In Cedarwood Moth Balls and Rings Product Highlights Natural Treatment Made with natural Eastern aromatic red cedar oil - revitalises your cedarwood products to provide effective, long-lasting control of clothes moths without the use of poisons. Freshens Fabrics Cedarwood helps prevent build-up of mustiness and mildew and leaves clothes smelling refreshed. Protects Clothes in Storage Cedarwood products are suitable for treating wardrobes, cupboards and drawers to protect delicate woollens and fabrics from clothes moth damage. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Product Highlights Natural Treatment Made from 100% natural Eastern aromatic red cedar to effectively repel clothes moths without the use of chemicals or poisons. Freshens Fabrics Help prevent build-up of mustiness and mildew and leaves clothes smelling refreshed.
